steps.title: Use the permanent-status clue
steps.content: The women are described as having lasting places in historical memory because they were first to accomplish their feats. The blank should name an action nobody can take to weaken that standing.

steps.title: Reject nonweakening verbs
steps.content: Choice B means suggest indirectly. Choice C means expand. Choice D means support or advance. None of those means weaken a person's standing. The answer is A.
